title: PMO / Transformation Manager (m/w/d)
required_skills: Cross-functional initiative delivery with measurable impact
matched_skills: PMO framework setup & governance (HSBC PMO role)
Programme governance & multi-workstream coordination (USD 8M programme at HSBC)
Financial tracking & budget dashboards (burn-rate, variance reporting)
Power BI / data visualisation for executive reporting
core_responsibilities: Build and manage a structured PMO framework to govern the company's Value Creation Plan (VCP)
Collaborate with department heads on transformation initiatives with measurable EBITDA impact
Develop precise management and investor reporting on KPIs, risks, and financial effects
Drive change management and build project management capability across the organisation
Lead or support ad-hoc strategic projects such as M&A integrations and cost reduction initiatives
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the USD 8M programme governance at HSBC — budget dashboards, burn-rate reports, and C-suite escalation map directly to investor reporting requirements
Emphasise multi-workstream coordination across 6 workstreams at HSBC as equivalent to PMO framework management
Showcase KPI framework design (VfB Stuttgart consulting project) to address performance reporting and governance structure requirements
Frame the Hapag-Lloyd role's structured sprint reviews and executive reporting as governance cadence experience
Stress cross-functional stakeholder management across Product, Engineering, Marketing, and C-suite to address the investor-facing communication requirement
Quantify financial impact where possible (USD 8M programme, 4.6M CNY contracts) to compensate for missing EBITDA-specific language
Acknowledge the social sector mission alignment — candidate's background spans mission-driven and commercial organisations

company_info.size_raw: No employee headcount found in JD; JD references 'mittelständischen Unternehmen (50–500 Mio. € Umsatz)' as client context, not company size
